question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies in the Campbell Conference who played in games where their team either won or lost

plan.question_intent: Average goals against per game for goalies in the Campbell Conference who played in games where their team either won or lost
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.ga, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.ga_per_game FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game FROM goalies AS g JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.ga, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.ga_per_game

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
join_clauses: JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
blocks.notes: Goalies in the Campbell Conference who played in games where their team either won or lost

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies AS g
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid

LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *

JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)

build_logs.notes: Average goals against per game for the selected goalies

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.tmid, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies AS g
JOIN teams AS t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN teamvsteam AS tv ON g.tmid = tv.tmid AND g.year = tv.year
JOIN abbrev AS a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (tv.l = 1 OR tv.w = 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average goals-against average per game among all goalies who played for teams in the Campbell Conference during seasons in which those teams either won or lost at least one game?
